purpose: Route OMA and Agent Lab feedback targets to the MAS Scholar Skills professional skill source of truth without externalizing MAS stage prompts or owner authority.

capabilities.externalization_reason: MAS stage prompts and owner authority stay in MAS; reusable medical professional skills are single-sourced in MAS Scholar Skills and consumed as refs-only candidates.

MAS stage prompts are domain-agent operating surfaces and stay in the MAS repo.
Tool access remains a MAS/Fabric connector boundary; professional skills may reference tools but do not become tools.
Medical research truth, source readiness, hypothesis portfolio, and publication memory are MAS knowledge refs.
MAS quality gates audit evidence and route repair targets without signing owner receipts or publication readiness.
Agent Lab receives refs-only suite and feedback targets; it does not own MAS domain truth.
